title: This MCP makes Hermes Agent 10x more powerful
summary: David Ondrej demonstrates Apify MCP Connectors integrated with Hermes Agent, claiming a 10x improvement in agent power. The connector enables broader functionality through Model Context Protocol integration.
writeup: David Ondrej demonstrates integrating Apify MCP Connectors with Hermes Agent, using the Model Context Protocol to extend the agent's available tools. The walkthrough covers how the connector broadens functionality and how tool integration fits into multi-agent systems. Ondrej claims the setup makes Hermes Agent ten times more powerful.
